title: miliusa chantaburiana
intro: Miliusa chantaburiana, also known as the Thai orchid tree or Phai Muang, is a plant species in the family Annonaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Miliusa chantaburiana is often used in teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
